name: blcaptain-style-skill
description: BLCaptain Style Skill: fixed-layout visual generation workflow for social cards, covers, decks, and article visuals.
author: 爆裂队长NEXT <blteam2026@outlook.com>

scripts.check: node --check bin/blcaptain-style.mjs && node --check render.mjs && node --check validate-social-deck.mjs && node --check scripts/asset-source-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/font-environment-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/full-bleed-composition-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/layout-geometry-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/make-readme-social-cover-wall.mjs && node --check scripts/run-gates.mjs && node --check scripts/style-pack-alignment-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/variant-proof.mjs && node --check src/assets.mjs && node --check src/audit.mjs && node --check src/data.mjs && node --check src/engine.mjs && node --check src/html.mjs && node --check src/imageWorkflow.mjs && node --check src/lintBrief.mjs && node --check src/plan.mjs && node --check src/render.mjs && node --check src/reviewReport.mjs && node --check src/stylePacks.mjs && node --check src/styles.css.mjs && node --check src/validate.mjs
scripts.test:gates: node --test scripts/blcaptain-visual-grammar-contracts.test.mjs && node --test scripts/cover-variety-expansion.test.mjs && node --test scripts/domestic-image-sources.test.mjs && node --test scripts/font-environment-gate.test.mjs && node --test scripts/full-bleed-composition-gate.test.mjs && node --test scripts/image-source-pipeline.test.mjs && node --test scripts/non-copying-boundary-alignment.test.mjs && node --test scripts/package-check-coverage.test.mjs && node --test scripts/plan-entry-alignment.test.mjs && node --test scripts/public-docs-alignment.test.mjs && node --test scripts/signal-content-routing.test.mjs && node --test scripts/signal-theme-palette.test.mjs && node --test scripts/skill-docs-alignment.test.mjs && node --test scripts/sp-ws-cover-mother-routing.test.mjs && node --test scripts/still-paper-theme-palette.test.mjs && node --test scripts/style-pack-alignment-gate.test.mjs && node --test scripts/style-pack-cli-output.test.mjs && node --test scripts/theme-cli-alignment.test.mjs && node --test scripts/three-languages-render.test.mjs && node --test scripts/thumbnail-readability-gate.test.mjs && node --test scripts/validate-content-gates.test.mjs && node --test scripts/visual-audit-read-errors.test.mjs
scripts.plan:sample: node bin/blcaptain-style.mjs plan examples/source-article.md --out examples/generated/planned-brief.json --style sl-blue --format xhs
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run test:gates
scripts.recommend:xhs-food: node bin/blcaptain-style.mjs recommend-style --platform xhs --category food --intent proof
scripts.recommend:wechat-ai: node bin/blcaptain-style.mjs recommend-style --platform wechat --category ai --intent essay
